{
  "judge_id": "your_judge_id",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.5", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],

  "rationale": {
    "R1.5": "The critique identifies structural issues but doesn't propose a concrete reorganization plan.",
    "R1.7": "The critique flags potential missing citations but doesn't provide specific examples or bibliographic details.",
    "RX.1": "The critique highlights uncertainty in some claims but doesn't quantify confidence levels or identify missing evidence for each recommendation.",
    "RX.3": "The critique mostly stays within the scope of the provided text, with one minor drift into discussing experimental methodology.",
    "RX.4": "The critique focuses on identifying potential issues and does not introduce any new errors or harmful content.",
    "RX.5": "The critique lacks specific examples of source tracing for proposed changes."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.5": 0.7,
    "R1.7": 0.8,
    "RX.1": 0.6,
    "RX.3": 0.9,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.6
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.5: The critique identifies structural issues but doesn't propose a concrete reorganization plan.
rationale.R1.7: The critique flags potential missing citations but doesn't provide specific examples or bibliographic details.
rationale.RX.1: The critique highlights uncertainty in some claims but doesn't quantify confidence levels or identify missing evidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The critique mostly stays within the scope of the provided text, with one minor drift into discussing experimental methodology.
rationale.RX.4: The critique focuses on identifying potential issues and does not introduce any new errors or harmful content.
